history.detail: Discovered durable ToolExecutorPort returns hashed receipts (not content) + policy decide is heavy; Flow A uses a lightweight content-returning interactive tool layer + read-risk gate, deferring full executor/policy/receipts to a later SA-01 flow
Scope mid-session /agent toggle out of Flow A (chat-core reuse in one loop is costly); --agent startup flag only. Orient context wired via ctx/orient buildOrientation
